summary: ESNI Management | Audiences | Verify Audiences Tab UI
description: Verify Audiences screen loads and displays audience data correctly
gherkin:
When the user navigates to the "Audiences" tab in the ESNI Management section
Then a button labeled "Add Audience" should be visible at the top-left of the screen
And a "Search" input field should be visible at the top-right of the screen
And a "View" button should be visible next to the search input
And a data table should be displayed with the following columns:
* Href
* Match
* Type
And each row should display valid values for:
* A unique Audience Href (e.g., /audience/a_mlb_108_abc)
* A Match value (e.g., NONE or ALL)
* A Type value (e.g., Authenticated or Country or Group or IP or Platform or Subscription or Zip)
And each row should have a "View Details" button (three-line icon) on the far right
And pagination controls should be visible at the bottom of the screen
And the default rows per page should be set to "25"

steps.action: *When* the user navigates to the "Audiences" tab in the ESNI Management section
steps.result:
*Then* a button labeled "Add Audience" should be visible at the top-left of the screen

*And* a "Search" input field should be visible at the top-right of the screen

*And* a "View" button should be visible next to the search input

*And* a data table should be displayed with the following columns:

* Href
* Match
* Type

*And* each row should display valid values for:

* A unique Audience Href (e.g., /audience/a_mlb_108_abc)

* A Match value (e.g., NONE or ALL)

* A Type value (e.g., Authenticated or Country or Group or IP or Platform or Subscription or Zip)

*And* each row should have a "View Details" button (three-line icon) on the far right

*And* pagination controls should be visible at the bottom of the screen

*And* the default rows per page should be set to "25"
